path.style: stroke: light-dark(rgb(178, 0, 0), rgb(204, 153, 255)); animation: 500ms linear infinite ge-flow-animation-JaXOUz9fXFI-SyIduUJd; stroke-dashoffset: 16px;
fill: light-dark(rgb(178, 0, 0), rgb(204, 153, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(178, 0, 0), rgb(204, 153, 255));
